title: Show and Hide
description:
The toggle button flips the `open` state, but the details panel is always visible — it ignores `open` entirely. Render the panel conditionally so it only appears when `open` is true. Use the `&&` short-circuit pattern: `{open && (

…

)}`.
objectives: Show the panel only when open is true, using `{open && (...)}`
hints: In JSX, `{condition && <Element/>}` renders the element only when the condition is truthy.
The state and the toggle already work — you only need to gate the panel on `open`.

checks.description: Panel is rendered conditionally with open &&
